message:
🐛 Add demo version data to Cluster Upgrade Status card (#835)

In demo mode, the card showed dashes for all cluster versions because
no local agent WebSocket is available. Now populates realistic
Kubernetes versions (e.g., v1.31.2 for EKS, v1.28.11 for OpenShift)
based on cluster name keywords, with upgrade recommendations shown
for clusters behind the latest minor version.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
